---
    title: "Les attendus Parcoursup sont-ils socialement discriminants ?"
    author: "Gabriel Ammour" 
    date: "2025-05-15"
    categories:
      - Master 2    
    format: 
      html: 
        toc: false
    engine: knitr
    freeze: false    
    slides:
       pdf: "manuscrit.pdf"  
---

<!-- This paper was produced as part of the *Natural Language Processing (NLP)* course presented by [Hamza Bennani](https://sites.google.com/site/hamzabennani01/). -->

```{css, echo=FALSE}
#title-block-header .description {
    display: none;
}
```

```{css echo=FALSE}
.embed-container {
    position: relative;
    padding-bottom: 129%;
    height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    max-width: 100%;
}

.embed-container iframe,
.embed-container object,
.embed-container embed {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
}
```

```{=html}
<div class="embed-container">
  <iframe src="`r rmarkdown::metadata$slides$pdf`#toolbar=0&navpanes=0" style="border: 0.5px"></iframe>
</div>
```
